name: agents-bmad
description: BMAD greenfield methodology: bmad-orchestrator master walks the persona arc (Analyst → PM → Architect → Scrum-Master → Dev → QA) with a blocking quality-gate at every handoff and a fail-closed no-code-before-plan PreToolUse gate (second instance of the AD/AID-PDLC sub-cycle contract). Implements RFC-013 / ADR-010: reuses existing forgeplan-aware personas (brief-intake/specification/adr-architect/architecture/goal-planner/coder/tester/code-reviewer/guardian/evidence-recorder) + a new bmad-orchestrator + /bmad + /bmad-init + bmad-gate (permissionDecision:deny, exit2 fail-closed) reading a per-branch phase state file.
